flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Lake Erie College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (35.9% → 29.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lake Erie College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.0k → $37.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lake Erie College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.0k → $37.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lake Erie College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.1% → 0.0%).
